title: Ability to resubmit a form with the same details
excerpt:
Can a form be submitted with same details more than once i.e. submit and reopen a 2nd with the same details for review and resubmit? 
This would help users submit multiple forms quickly, when they are submitting mostly t…

posts.author: HayleyTaylor (Hayley Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can a form be submitted with same details more than once i.e. submit and reopen a 2nd with the same details for review and resubmit?

This would help users submit multiple forms quickly, when they are submitting mostly the same data on multiple tickets.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @HayleyTaylor

Our monday app Easyform supports URL parameters form all field types, with the option of hiding or disabling fields. Using thie feature you can pre-populate your forms with repetitive data. Please check out our documentation here.

If you want help setting this up or have any questions, you can reach us at easyformsupport@easyapphq.com or book a call with us here.
